category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric or cordless power tools exported from China to Mozambique, assessed against INNOQ national conformity, adopted NM/IEC standards, INCM radio rules for cordless models, and Portuguese-language documentation duties.

title.en: China-to-Mozambique Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入莫桑比克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入莫三比克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Mozambique market access through INNOQ national conformity, adopted NM/IEC 62841 electrical safety, EMC, noise handling, INCM radio approval for cordless models, and Portuguese-language documentation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与莫桑比克市场准入对照，覆盖 INNOQ 国家符合性、采纳的 NM/IEC 62841 电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声处理、无绳型号的 INCM 无线电批准以及葡萄牙语文件要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與莫三比克市場准入對照，涵蓋 INNOQ 國家符合性、採納的 NM/IEC 62841 電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲處理、無繩型號的 INCM 無線電批准以及葡萄牙語文件要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Mozambique law, INNOQ national standards and conformity procedures, INCM radio approval, import inspection practice, and Portuguese-language documentation duties with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行莫桑比克法律、INNOQ 国家标准与符合性程序、INCM 无线电批准、进口检验实践及葡萄牙语文件义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行莫三比克法律、INNOQ 國家標準與符合性程序、INCM 無線電批准、進口檢驗實務及葡萄牙語文件義務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Mozambique, the practical baseline is INNOQ national conformity against adopted NM/IEC standards (typically the IEC 62841 family for electrical safety), import inspection, INCM type approval for any cordless radio function, and Portuguese-language documentation. Mozambique uses 220 V at 50 Hz; there is no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking regime, so noise is handled as a general safety and documentation topic rather than a standalone mandatory mark.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入莫桑比克，实务基线是 INNOQ 依据采纳的 NM/IEC 标准（电气安全通常采用 IEC 62841 系列）进行国家符合性、进口检验、任何无绳无线电功能的 INCM 型号核准以及葡萄牙语文件。莫桑比克电网为 220 V、50 Hz；不存在欧盟式户外噪声产品标识制度，因此噪声作为一般安全与文件议题处理，而非独立强制标识。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入莫三比克，實務基線是 INNOQ 依據採納的 NM/IEC 標準（電氣安全通常採用 IEC 62841 系列）進行國家符合性、進口檢驗、任何無繩無線電功能的 INCM 型號核准以及葡萄牙語文件。莫三比克電網為 220 V、50 Hz；不存在歐盟式戶外噪聲產品標識制度，因此噪聲作為一般安全與文件議題處理，而非獨立強制標識。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag; human_reviewed stays false until a named reviewer confirms Mozambique INNOQ, INCM, and import-inspection sources.
